diagrams.title: HDLC Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the byte-oriented structure of HDLC frame with all fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frame format and field functions in bit-oriented protocols

diagrams.title: Stop-and-Wait Protocol
diagrams.description: Timeline showing sender transmits frame, waits for ACK, then sends next frame
elements: Receiver: receives Frame 0 → ACK 0 → receives Frame 1 → ACK 1
Time delay showing idle waiting periods
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the sequential nature and inefficiency of Stop-and-Wait protocol

diagrams.title: Sliding Window Protocol
diagrams.description: Shows sender and receiver windows with sequence numbers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple frames can be in transit simultaneously

diagrams.title: Go-Back-N Retransmission
diagrams.description: Timeline showing error scenario and retransmission
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Go-Back-N handles errors by retransmitting all subsequent frames

diagrams.title: Selective Repeat Retransmission
diagrams.description: Timeline showing selective retransmission of only lost frame
diagrams.purpose: Understanding efficiency of Selective Repeat in handling errors

visuals.title: Data Link Layer Protocols
visuals.description: Visual diagram for data link layer protocols
